Hey! You found the readme.

If you're reading this, you're the kind of person I want to work with!

project_01.exe — (RE)ROUTE
(RE)ROUTE
Type: Web Application
Stack: Agentic WorkflowsUX ResearchProduct DesignData
Location: Barcelona
Status: Prototype · On-going
Created: 2025
Context: Master's Thesis — ELISAVA
Description: What if navigation optimised for how you feel, not just where you go? This web app reimagines walking as an experience with routing for safety, discovery, and human-ness.
119K segments
386 POIs
3 modes

PROBLEM

Every navigation app solves the same problem: getting you there fast. But what about making the walk worth taking? (re)Route does more than just get you from A to B — it brings the city to you, with journeys that spark.

APPROACH

INTENT OVER INPUT

Users type feelings, not addresses. One AI call interprets mood as navigation intent.

DATA-INFORMED ROUTES

119K street segments scored for noise, safety, greenery. Routes built from real characteristics, not just distance.

SAFETY AS DEFAULT

After dark, every route auto-shifts to well-lit streets. Not a toggle — a baseline.

GO — destination routing
EXPLORE — vibe-based discovery
WANDER — compass + curated pins
project_02.exe — SNAPP
SNAPP
Type: Mobile Web App
Stack: Product DesignFull-StackUXGamification
Location: Barcelona
Status: In use · Feb 2026
Created: 2026
Context: Personal Project
Description: A word a day. Infinite discovery. This web app helps humans look up from their screens to discover the beauty around them through daily quests.
1 prompt/day
0 likes by design
∞ perspectives

PROBLEM

We walk past a thousand interesting things every day without noticing them. Snapp turns our everyday environment into a canvas for discovery, with a daily word prompt that gets everyone looking up and sharing what they find.

APPROACH

ONE CONSTRAINT

One word per day. The constraint IS the creativity. Limits create focus.

EPHEMERAL BY DESIGN

Map resets at midnight. No archive, no likes. The impermanence creates urgency without anxiety.

COLLECTIVE SEEING

Same prompt, different eyes. The city becomes a collaborative gallery through shared interpretation.

DAILY PROMPT
Daily word prompt
PHOTO CAPTURE
Camera + location tagging
SHARED MAP
City-wide shared gallery
project_03.exe — PLANMYTRIP
PLANMYTRIP
Type: Web Application
Stack: FrontendAPIsEditorial Design
Location: Personal
Status: In use · Mar 2025
Created: 2025
Context: Personal Project — AI-assisted build
Description: A planning tool that thinks like an editor, not a spreadsheet. This online editor turns yearly family trip planning into interactive editorial-style content.
planmytrip.app
15 days
9 cities
LIVE weather

PROBLEM

"Trip planning tools are either ugly spreadsheets or rigid templates. I wanted something useful that also looks like something you'd want to look at."

APPROACH

EDITOR NOT SPREADSHEET

Planning should feel like designing a magazine, not filling cells. Editorial layout as interface.

LIVE DATA LAYER

Weather, images, and schedules update in real-time. A planning tool that knows what's happening.

AI-ASSISTED BUILD

Designed the spec, prompted the build. A proof that clear thinking produces working products.

planmytrip.app
ITINERARY VIEW
City intro + day overview
planmytrip.app
WEATHER & DETAILS
Weather widgets + timeline

project_01.exe — (RE)ROUTE
(RE)ROUTE
Stack: AIUX ResearchProduct DesignData
Location: Barcelona
Status: Master's Thesis · 2025
Description: What if navigation optimised for how you feel, not just where you go? Reimagining walking with routing for safety, discovery, and human-ness.
GO
119K segments
386 POIs
89% vary routes

PROBLEM

"Every navigation app gets you there fast. But what about making the walk worth taking?"

APPROACH

INTENT OVER INPUT

Mood as navigation intent.

DATA-INFORMED

Routes from real street data.

SAFETY DEFAULT

Well-lit streets after dark.

GO
GO mode
EXPLORE
EXPLORE mode
WANDER
WANDER mode

PROMPT
1 word/day
1 photo
∞ perspectives

APPROACH

ONE CONSTRAINT

Limits create focus.

EPHEMERAL

COLLECTIVE
